reviews.review_description: It was great experience while I'm playing CricVRX . I had great experience n enjoying very much.. graphics are awesome.. keep it up CricVRX.
I saw this in a mall and ended up buying the Quest to play it at home. I just can't get the bat controller to calibrate as there's no option other than bat height
Not a good game.ground is too small.no target.only we can play a mark.

Game is great ,once it works..when first bought played one over returned to menu screen and froze..tried uninstalling and reloading at least six I
times..no joy. Left it for a week ,reinstalled and has started working the last four days on the trot !!!!

Hi, I love playing this game and think it has huge potential. But for the past couple of days, I am running into problems with it. Sometimes when I start the game, the main screen appears but the Start and Settings buttons are non responsive, can't click anything, this behaviour is random. Sometimes it starts, sometimes it just freezes and nothing works. Can you look into it ? please... I really like the game and have been referring to my friends to buy, but with this kind of glitches, I wont be able to do that .... can you please look into it and fix it ?

developer_response.body: Dear User, Thanks for reaching out us. We will definitely look into it. Can you please share more information at info@cricvrx.com? Thanks & Regards

reviews.review_description: I liked this cricket  game very much. I was giving real experience while playing. Cricvrx is best cricket game.

developer_response.body: Dear User, Thanks for playing CricVRX. It was a great pleasure for us that you liked the game.

reviews.review_title: One of the best cricket experience ever
reviews.review_description:
This was fun and better than any other cricket games played before

Must try

developer_response.body: Hello, thank you for your encouraging feedback. We are loved to see your review. We are working this game to optimise gameplay for you and add more realistics cricket experiences. Please let us know if you have any suggestions or feedbacks at info@skippyapps.com.

reviews.review_description: It was a great experience while playing CricVRX. Amazing graphics. Very real effects. Good sports games

developer_response.body: Dear Malik, Thanks for playing CricVRX. It was a great pleasure for us that you liked the game
